#  Delete a Drawing Area 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Before you can delete a drawing area, you must first delete all of its drawings. See [Delete Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-drawings).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Locate the drawing area you want to delete.
  3. Click the gear ![Icon Settings Gear Grey](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d651ae1e759a4006d989865fe93a0703/c5de24f60e608c6628a50f5ac5356031/icon-settings-gear-grey.png?fm=webp&h=18)icon and select **Delete from the drop-down list.**  
_Note_ : The delete action is only available if there are no drawings in the drawing area. 


## See Also
  * [Enable or Disable Drawing Areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-drawing-areas)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings)
title: Delete a Drawing Area
description: How to delete a drawing area from the project's Drawings tool.
